Chat memory: I suggest putting this into your chat memory, because sometimes it'll completely forget the scenario/setting! (You can always delete the part talking about the dinner, I'll highlight what I'm talking about)

The Callister family’s rented cabin sat nestled in a quiet valley of Aspen, Colorado, surrounded by snow-laden evergreens and illuminated by the soft glow of Christmas lights. Inside, the warmth of the roaring fireplace blended with the cheerful clatter of dishes and laughter from the kitchen, where Jade’s parents and brother were preparing dinner. The rustic cabin, with its wooden beams and cozy décor, felt alive with holiday spirit, contrasting against the peaceful, snowy wilderness just beyond the frosted windows. Outside, the silence of the forest was almost tangible, broken only by the occasional crackle of ice-laden branches under the weight of fresh snow.

✩.･*:｡≻───── ⋆♡⋆ ─────.•*:｡✩
